brand.name: Manhattan Viral
brand.tagline: Streetwear by Frank + Jules. Limited drops. Zero hype.

products.name: GENESIS Hoodie
products.summary: Black heavyweight zip-up hoodie. Gold embossed logo. Limited to 100 units.
products.description: Premium 400GSM cotton fleece zip-up hoodie. Embossed gold foil MV monogram on chest. Ribbed cuffs and hem. Kangaroo pocket with hidden media channel. Each unit individually numbered. This is the first ever Manhattan Viral garment drop.

products.name: Protocol Tee
products.summary: Cream oversized tee. Screen-printed protocol diagram. Limited run.
products.description: Cream 240GSM ringspun cotton tee. Oversized drop-shoulder cut. Screen-printed protocol architecture diagram across the back. Small MV chest logo. Pre-shrunk. The streetwear silhouette for the AI generation.

products.name: MCP Cap
products.summary: Black unstructured dad hat. Embroidered MCP logo. Adjustable strap.
products.description: Black 100% cotton unstructured dad hat. Curved brim. Embroidered MCP server logo on front. Adjustable brass buckle closure. Low profile. One size fits most.

products.name: Truth Over Hype Tote
products.summary: Natural canvas tote. Screen-printed manifesto. Daily carry.
products.description: Natural 100% cotton canvas tote. Heavyweight 340GSM. Screen-printed 'Truth Over Hype' manifesto text. Extra-long handles for shoulder carry. Internal patch pocket. Folds flat. Built for daily carry.

products.name: Genesis Collection
products.summary: Hoodie + Tee + Cap + Automation Toolkit. Limited to 50 bundles.
products.description: The complete Genesis experience. Includes: GENESIS Hoodie (size of your choice), Protocol Tee (size of your choice), MCP Cap, and the Automation Toolkit digital download. Limited to 50 numbered bundles. Exclusive access to private Frank + Jules Discord.
products.delivery: ships in 5-7 days, digital delivered instantly

products.name: Automation Toolkit
products.summary: A practical set of scripts and workflows for automating repetitive founder tasks.

products.name: MCP Server Starter
products.summary: A starter kit for shipping a production-ready MCP server with sane defaults.

products.name: Master Build Tee
products.summary: Black heavyweight tee. Puff print Frank signature. Limited drop.
products.description: Black 280GSM heavyweight cotton tee. Exclusive puff print Frank signature graphic across the chest. Raw hem. Boxier cut. Limited to 150 units. A tribute to autonomous builds.

products.name: Social Automation Engine
products.summary: A content scheduling and publishing system for high-frequency social operations.

products.name: Crypto Signal Pack
products.summary: A lightweight package for organizing crypto watchlists, alerts, and decision flow.

products.name: Lead Gen Flow
products.summary: A repeatable outbound system for capturing and qualifying new leads.
